reviews.text: From our initial web enquiry for some clean attic storage, the response was extremely fast and appointment scheduled very quickly. We then had Col come and inspect and provide the quote. Col happily answered questions when we had them even after the quote was sent. For our installation, Caleb and Mick did an awesome job and even finished a day early! Extremely happy with the final product and happy to recommend to anyone wanting that bit of extra storage!

From Col quoting through to installation with Scott, Clint and Mick every stage was flawless. Everyone communicated, were very professional and cleaned up all sawdust inside and outside. Scott did an amazing job installing and adding the final finishes to the skylight. Once I have it painted it will look even better.

We recently had Roof Space Renovators install a clean room attic space for us, and the whole experience was excellent. From the very start with Colin at the quoting stage, right through to Caleb who completed the installation and Andrew who was also involved, the process was smooth and professional.

The result is fantastic – a great finish that has completely transformed what was previously wasted space into something really useful. The team were friendly, tidy, and respectful throughout the job, making sure to clean up at the end of each day.

Since we installed it the ladder hasn't been up, the kids have been up in there setting up reading spaces and going through old books and comics stored there.

We couldn’t be happier with the outcome and would highly recommend Roof Space Renovators to anyone considering this option. It’s such a smart way to make use of space that otherwise just sits there unused.

After a hail storm in late 2025 destroyed my polycarbonate skylight,  I was in urgent need of a replacement. Roof Space Renovators attended quickly and provided me with a quote to get the job done fast. They listened to my concerns about future storm damage risk and were able to future proof my skylight with a toughened glass double glazed product superior to what I had originally. Both the person quoting and the installers were friendly, efficient and left no mess. Would recommend.

Highly recommend getting work done by Roof Space Renovators. I had a tight turnaround time to get a bathroom skylight installed and they were able to fit me in and get the job done! The skylight gives the bathroom such a wow factor and  I’m just so pleased with it. Looking forward to getting more jobs done by them in the future!

Thank you to the team at Roof Space Renovators for a positive and seamless experience. They were professional and great with their communication. I want to say a huge thank you to Jodie who was incredibly flexible and helpful when I requested an alteration to the original plan. I had no expectations, but Jodie was very accommodating. Not only do I highly recommend Roof Space Renovators, but I will be using them again.

I have been trying to get my skylight replaced for almost two years but had issues with other companies. Roof Space Renovators put my mind at ease and were more than happy to assist and got the ball rolling right away! Colin was amazing when he came to inspect and quote for my skylight replacement and his colleagues Caleb and Mick were incredible for the install. They all had great communication, super efficient and professional. Will be recommending Roof Space Renovators for any other skylight replacements within my complex. Thank you so much!

Thank you Roof Space Renovators! Our home was incredibly hot in the warmer months and we were looking for something to help, we found Roof Space Renovators and had them supply & install a couple of Solar Heat Extractors. They have made a noticeable difference to our homes internal temperature. We’d recommend them to anyone!

We had the team replace two, very old and worn skylights with amazing glass units.
From initial contact, everything was quick and easy, seamless and reasonably priced.
The finished product is more than we could have asked for.

I wish all trades were as good as these guys.

From the moment Col came to give us a quote, we felt listened to and in good hands. The process was super smooth and as easy is gets.

Their tradies were great. Really clean and respectful. Special shoutout to Scott the chippie who was awesome and did a fantastic job.

10/10 I’d use these guys again.

Skylight installation.    Easy to deal with, great outcome and fantastic customer service - coupled with detailed, highly experienced trades people who arrived on time, communicated every step of the way, and left the area spotlessly clean upon completion.  Highly recommend this company - a really great experience from beginning to end.

We recently had 2 skylights installed and couldn't be happier with the experience. The team were fabulous! they were polite, friendly and professional from start to finish. Everything was done efficiently and to a high standard. Highly recommend!

We had Roof Space Renovators install 3 roof windows into our dark timber ceilings.  We couldn’t be happier with the result!  They look great, and the amount of natural light they let in is amazing.  We highly recommend Roof Space Renovators and if the need arose, we would use them again for sure.

Geoff Baker, Ballarat
I recently purchased an attic ladder for delivery to Victoria.  The purchase process was very simple, and I am so pleased with the quality and finish of the product received.
I couldn’t be happier,
I would highly recommend Roof Space Renovators.  Thank you.

Mick and Cabel from roof space renovations arrived on time and installed  my attic ladder and ceiling flooring in a very professional and timely manner.
Can recommend

Andrew and his team at Roof Space Renovators project managed the installation of our skylights seamlessly. Our initial quote and assessment with Colin helped us understand all the options and products as well as what was feasible and what might need compromising. The installers Scott and Clint are incredibly hardworking and consulted us at various stages during the install to double check placement and that our expectations were being met. Our project was installed within the stated timeframe without delay. The team were highly responsive to all our queries  and concerns and cleaned up each day. Incredibly refreshing to work with tradesman who are care about their work and deliver on their promises.
Thanks!
Nick (Alderley)

Couldn't be happier with my new ceiling ladder installed by Roof Space Renovators. From my initial enquiry to the completed work they were a professional and friendly set of people, and I would recommend them as the go to business if you are looking for access options to gain entry to a roof space.

Roof Space Renovators recently installed a Roof Window in my newly renovated bathroom.  Scott, the installer, did a great job in some tricky circumstances with a few showers making the roof work a little challenging. The finished product is fantastic. Very happy with the product and installation.... good chance we'll be lining up for one or two more roof products in the near future

After researching numerous options over 1 year to add an extra bedroom to our house, we finally chose to build a premium storage room with Roof Space Renovators. Admittedly, we were a little scared at the thought of having a large hole cut open in the middle of our living/kitchen/dining area - however this option seemed like the best by far with respect to price, usability, resale value and build time. Throughout the entire process, Andrew and his team were wonderful to deal with. Their level of customer service and workmanship was second to none and not something you see very often nowadays. We particularly liked how Andrew, John (the builder) and the engineer attended site and consulted with us to find a suitable solution to turning the space into two bedrooms instead of one (we ended up with an issue of both older children wanting their rooms up there). We found one and the build commenced a couple of weeks later, with the entire project (inclusive of our engaged trades, eg flooring, painting, aircon install) being finished in 3 weeks and just before Christmas. We could not believe how perfectly everything went. Now several weeks later, the kids are loving their new bedrooms and we now have a spare room for guests (or storage!). In addition to the premium storage room, Roof Space Renovators also installed a skylight as part of the above project. It has made such a difference to our home office. Previously a very dark room, which required lights on at all times, it is now bright and fantastic to work in. No more sore eyes! Based on our experience with Roof Space Renovators, we would highly recommend them to others and would certainly use them again. Thanks so much Andrew, John, Jodie & team.

Highly recommend Roof Space Renovators!
Construction was completed today of our Attic Storage Room and Attic Ladder and we could not be happier with the service by the team at Roof Space Renovators.
We were able to get 15m2 of additional storage in our roof which will help to declutter our living space of all those things we only use a few times a year.
From the first phone call to installation the service has been exceptional. Great communication by the team in the office, Colin for our in-home consult and Mick who installed everything.
Mick arrived on-time, explained each day what was the plan for the day and left our house in clean condition each day.
Thanks to all the team and if you are thinking about giving RSR a call, just do it NOW!

We are absolutely stoked with our clean storage space in our roof. Being able to stand up in the space to access everything makes it so easy to use. The process from quotes right through to installation and some small plastering work we needed done at the end completed by Dan was outstanding. Clint and Caleb were a pleasure to have in our home during installation and their attention to detail to make the most of the area was exceptional.
We now have plenty of room for our all storage needs. Doing the figures it’s a much better option than paying for storage hire and much more convenient as well  A real asset to our home ! We highly recommend Roof Space Renovators

Wow, we are absolutely blown away with the sky window installed from the team at Roof Space Reno’s. Thank you so much for such a wonderful service and product. We already want another 3! It’s added so much light to our home - the only thing I’d do differently would be contacting them sooner! Thanks again 😃
Wonderful experience having our skylight installed as part of our kitchen renovation. Everyone was prompt, professional and friendly and left everything neat and tidy ready for painting. Thank you!

Col and the team did an excellent job on my new skylight.
Communication was excellent and the arrived exactly when they said they would.
My new skylight has made a massive difference to what was a dark and dingy room.
It survived the recent storms here in Brisbane over Christmas with no problems at all.
Absolutely fantastic service.
Thanks!
Highly recommend Roof Space Renovators. I have used them twice and they have been prompt to reply, punctual & friendly. Work was completed as arranged and with no issues 😊

I absolutely love my new skylights and I couldn’t have asked for better service and meticulous attention to detail.  Nothing was too much trouble including a small revision once the rafters were revealed. Scott and Dan kept the workplace spotless and were a pleasure to deal with. I would highly recommend this company from the initial quote to completion was so smooth and a great experience. (Painting still to be done by me 😊)

Hi Andrew, I just wanted to write a quick note to let you know how pleased we are with the roof storage your team created for us.  You were recommended by a friend and I would have no hesitation in recommending your business to others.  Everyone we dealt with was professional and courteous.  The extra storage has freed up so much space in our home. And the city view from the window isn't too shabby either!  Thanks once again, Tony and Sally

Seriously! Best decision ever. I was downsizing from a house to a townhouse and the space I have added by using roof space renovators is priceless. The team is very friendly and helpful, worked around other contractors and were great with communication. Even showed up on time! Cannot fault them or their service. Worth every cent and highly recommend.
Another great job by Gavin, er, Colin... haha, (inside joke), Clint, Mick, Jodie and the whole team at RSR. My second time using them and couldn't recommend them highly enough. Thanks team.

From first contact to after completion, Roof Space Renovators couldn't have been more helpful.  I contacted them for an Attic Ladder as my daughter had used them a couple of years ago and she was happy with her install.    Ours was installed this week and the install was done very professionally.  Very satisfied customer here and I'd have no hesitation in recommending Roof Space Renovators to anyone thinking about putting one in.

Called RSR and Col came out within the week to talk options. Very lively bloke😂 He said it was a 6 week wait and given a date. Kim confirmed via email then Scott showed up on time, and installed then cleaned up after. Very respectful and felt comfortable with him being in my home.
Dan came 3 days later and plastered the gaps then also cleaned up after himself. I removed all kitchen appliances beforehand (saves them time too). Now I simply have to paint and enjoy my bright kitchen 😁

We now have somewhere for my mother in law to stay! Only joking. The team came out today and built us a lovely storage attic. They were on time, extremely careful and did an amazing quality job, more than we imagined. Very happy with their work, wouldn’t hesitate to refer a friend or a google reviewer.
Great tradesmanship! Polite, punctual and cleand up after. New floorspace looks great. I'm very happy and would definitely recommend!

Great service and great people to deal with. Turned up on time, did a great install and cleaned up afterwards. Very happy with the finished product. Very professional! Now to put a floor down and use the huge storage space in my ceiling.!

Great experience from the consultation with Col, to the speedy install with Scott and Clint. Everyone we spoke to was genuinely nice, and a pleasure to deal with. I would definitely recommend roof space renovators and would use them again.
From the first phone call right up to the end of installation, the process was so easy. I’d absolutely recommend this company.

A really great experience. From the assistance when I first visited the showroom from Patricia and Jodie, to the visit from Col to measure and quote and provide great advice, to the completion of the job with Daniel.
A first class experience from beginning to end. Which was a major help for my family as we had lost all of our downstairs storage area and living space due to the Brisbane floods in February. So we were squeezed very tightly with storage lying all over our house. This extra space has saved us and allowed our family to finally move back in to our home.
Thanks so much RSR!

Roof Space renovators are an extremely professional company to work with. Their communication is prompt and they are always happy to explain the difference in their products and pricing. I found them very easy to work with for my client who required an attic staircase and floorboard install to create a massive space to store all the excess equipment a large family amasses. My client was very happy with the install and price. As this was a new process for both of us, Jody made it a simple task from start to finish. I would highly recommend their service to anyone wanting to create extra space with little hassle.
Michelle Bushby,
Mich Interiors
The Brickworks, Southport, QLD

After purchasing my townhouse last year, I reached out to Roof Space renovators, and they did a magnificent job of creating much needed amazing storage space in my roof cavity with quality workmanship and friendly efficient service. I then went on to purchase a solar heat extractor for the space, another amazing job. Clint who I worked with at Roof Space was a pleasure to deal with and his work is excellent. All the staff are super friendly and very knowledgeable. Thank you, Roof Space Renovators. Highly recommended.

We’re more than happy with the product and service received from Roof Space Renovators. A prompt, friendly response to our initial enquiry with a follow up visit to quote. A no fuss, professional Installation done on the arranged date with a full site cleanup.
The roof space is now easily accessed via strong telescopic steps and the usable storage space is on a solid floor base.
Do yourself a favour and give this company a call, you wont be disappointed.

RSR were a standout from the beginning. Honestly a dream to deal with — clear communication, easy to book, and very professional throughout the process.

We had a challenging install that other companies in the Tweed area either declined or weren’t confident tackling. RSR took the time to understand the job properly and found a way to get it done without cutting corners. We even changed our mind throughout the process to another product and they were entirely understanding and willing to accomodate.

Their workmanship is excellent, the product is high quality, and the pricing was reasonable — especially considering the complexity of the work. We LOVE our skylight.

After some disappointing experiences with other installers, we’re glad we found RSR. Straightforward, skilled, and reliable. Would absolutely recommend - we couldn’t love

(Image taken before plastering)

We cannot recommend Roof Space Renovators highly enough.We found the entire team to be friendly, enthusiastic and extremely knowledgeable - we especially appreciated the invaluable advice given to us at the start on skylights which would best suit our roof. The team went out of their way to accomodate us in terms of scheduling. The entire process was smooth from start to finish, workmanship incredible, and it's very clear how dedicated they are to providing the very best service. Thank you Roof Space Renovators!

Super happy with the result and it will help us reclaim our front room again.
Caleb who handled our installation was polite, professional and did an amazing job.

We had Roof Space Renovators install a skylight in our Kitchen. We thought they were very honest, punctual, professional & reasonably priced. We are very pleased with our skylight they installed for us as their workmanship was to a high standard as their installer made sure all work was completed properly as the installer took pride in the work he does. We would high recommend using this company for anyone looking to get this type of work done.
Thank you to all team members that where involved in our skylight purchase & installation, great job guys.
Thanks Andrew & Jodie at Roof Space Renovators for your great customer service.

From start to finish, Jodie, Andrew and Kim were on point with their communication towards us and our Site Supervisor during our home build, always willing to educate and go the extra mile to help us understand the products we’re investing in as well as the processes behind the work that needs to be done.

We can say with utmost honesty that aside from their great communication/service, they were able to install our hallway skylight to an extremely high standard of work..you can see and ‘feel’ the care/thought that’s been put into it.  They also left the site clean without a trace of rubbish to be seen.

It’s not often you get to experience this level of excellence from trades nowadays but my wife and I can truly say it can be found through these guys.
Support small businesses like this—especially ones who do care about maintaining a high standard of service and workmanship.

We absolutely love our new skylights installed by the team at Roof Space Renovators. Andrew and the team have been extremely professional throughout the entire process with Andrew providing lots of advice, options and cost-effective solutions during our discussions. We are currently in the process of building a house and the team worked seamlessly with our builder to ensure the installation occurred at the right time during the building process and without disruption. The installers were friendly and professional. Overall we received exactly what we had hoped for and would highly recommend Roof Space Renovators to anyone looking for skylight installation.

We found Jodie from Roof Space Renovators excellent to deal with regarding the installation of a skylight in our kitchen area, which has been transformational. The price was competitive and the time from commiting to installation was much sooner than we had expected. The installers were also very professional and did an excellent job. Over all, I would not hesitate recommending Roof Space Renovators for someone considering installing a quality skylight.

We would highly recommend Roof Space Renovators for your skylight install. From meeting Col who quoted our job to Clint & Caleb who completed our job the entire experience has been very professional as well as delivering an amazing finished product.

From the first call, to getting someone out to quote and then having the roof storage installed, I could not be happier with Roof Space Renovators. They were helpful and worked with is to get us to make sure we got the best storage space with out budget. 100% recommended

We recently had a clean storage area, ladder and extraction fan completed by the Roof Space Renovators. The whole process from the team was excellent from the quote and fitout recommendations up to the installation by Clint and Caleb. They were on time and completed within allocated time with them checking with me at all parts of the install to check that I was happy. Would fully recommend these guys if you were thinking of any roof renovation works.
The Roof Space Renovators were easy to deal with, prompt and provided a fantastic product. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend their business to others.

From the moment Col walked into our home to measure we knew we had made the right decision choosing Roof Space Renovators.  Extremely professional, excellent workmanship and a beautiful product.  Can not recommend more highly.  We are so happy with our new Skylight.

We have recently had a skylight installed by Roof Space Renovators and absolutely love it!! it lets so much light into our kitchen now and the view looking up seeing the sky is wonderful! Andrew and his team are very professional to deal with, from start to finish. They have to be some of the tidiest tradesmen that we've come across, cleaning up afterwards looked like they hadn't even been here. I would definitely recommend this company and would not hesitate to use there services again! thank you guys :)

Absolutely amazing company to deal with. Affordable, well built, great attitudes from the builders, reception and just a wonderful easy experience overall.

Now we have a good sized storage space that's easy to access and looks great.  Bigger than it looks in the photos and you can stand fully upright in the middle.

We went with the clean storage option with 2 skylights and the end result exceeded our expectations. Would recommend this company 100%.

Being in a 3 bedroom town house with 4 adults we were limited to storage solutions. We engaged Roof Space Renovators who were very easy to deal with and quick to respond. Their staff were helpful,  friendly yet professional. We installed a basic attic which solved our issue. They were reasonably priced and I am happy with the final product. I would recommend and use them again. Thank you Roof Space Renovators.

The experience with the Roof Space Renovators team was fantastic.  We were looking for a business that had good reviews.  We are more than happy to confirm that we shared the seemingly unanimous opinion that the team delivers five star value.  Starting with the quoting process, which was straightforward and good value compared to other quotes.

We converted the roof space of a 70 year old house.  It involved structural reinforcement of the ground floor, first floor, and the roof itself - so not a simple job.  Internal stairs were custom-made which added to the complexity of the job.  At every step Andrew, Jodie, Ben and all the team were extremely helpful and flexible.  We changed our mind a couple of times for certain items, and even asked for help to install an additional steel beam.  I always had the impression that the whole team was doing everything possible to make it a pleasant experience.  This is not typical of your average construction/renovation company!

Most importantly, the end result is a dream - we love it.  We still need to paint the room, and we'll post some pictures when it's finished.  I'd like to say special thanks to Ben, Dennis and Clint for all their professional workmanship, flexibility and super friendly demeanour.  You guys are legends!

We had one Roof Window installed in December 2018 and we were so pleased with the product and the service that we have just had another two installed! Andrew and the team are great to deal with from start to finish, their communication is fantastic and they get the work done efficiently and on time. Any questions or problems are dealt with quickly and with care, a true mark of a company focused on Customer Satisfaction! I would highly recommend this company based on their quality of work, attention to detail and superb customer service.

Great People to deal with and once you master the instructions ( could be done a little better , perhaps a diagram ) it is so easy to install . 4 and a 1/4 hours from cutting the hole in the Ceiling to packing up done . Would recommend this firm to any one installing a roof ladder ,

We recently had our very old skylight replaced. Everybody on the Roof Space Renovators team made the whole process from initial inquiry to the installation of the skylight easy and effortless. We were happy with the price we paid. And we LOVE the new skylight and the amount of natural light it allows into our kitchen. Thank you!

Had a great experience with the Roof Space Renovators . Both during the initial advice and quote , then the follow up and installation of the Skylights .
Great job highly recommend this company .👊👍

Very happy in my dealings with the team at the Roof Space Renovators. They removed old opening roof windows and installed new ones in my attic bedroom. I found the team very professional, prompt and easy to communicate with. The job was well done!

Very happy with the installation of my new skylight. Everyone that I dealt with was very friendly and professional. Scott did a great job on the installation and plasterer Troy went above and beyond. I would have liked the option to have the painting included but overall, a great service and would definitely recommend.

Roof Space Renovators were prompt getting out to my house to examine and quote the ladder and attic flooring. Once I accepted their quote, their ability to book in and install was quick and the finished product was outstanding. Will definitely be coming back for future projects.

Roof Space Renovators installed 6 Skylights in our newly built home. From the moment we met with Andrew until the finalisation of the project it was an incredible professional process. Compared to other suppliers Roof Space Renovators were definitely the BEST. Andrew's consultation, his quick and professional response and the installation of the skylights went extremely well. Couldn't have asked for any better company. Can recommend them at any time!!!

The team at Roof Space Renovators has been absolutely amazing to deal with, from start (quote) to finish (clean attic storage space). Col was absolutely awesome to deal with through the quoting process and Scott the installer did an amazing job installing the final product. One of the best companies I have dealt with.

I am very impressed with the Statesman attic ladder that I purchased from Roof Space Renovators. Due to my location, I had to use a carpenter to install it for me. I was also impressed about how easily the aluminium ladder slides up and down.

We couldn't have asked for better with our roof access ladder and storage floor installation. Mick and Caleb were a delight to have in our home, turned up on time, did a fantastic job and left the work area clean and tidy.

We had Roof Restoration remove a wooden attic ladder and install an electric one. From the first phone call Andrew was extremely helpful and great to deal with. The boys who did the installation were precise and completed the install perfectly. I would highly recommend them if you want a smooth without any hassle installation. Thank you.

The Roof Space Renovator team are a great team to deal with, from the time of quoting and booking a job in to arriving and performing the work, they were a pleasure to deal with, very professional. Great  job on doing our new skylight, we are very happy with it thanks.

We had Scott come and install our Budget Attic & Ladder above our garage today and we are thrilled with his professionalism, personality, attention to detail and providing us with the perfect storage space.  After first meeting Col who came and quoted, we knew we were in great hands with this business.  Then Jodie keeping excellent communication with us, we will definitely be recommending Roof Space Renovators to our neighbours and friends.  Thank you so much :)

Really great team, did a fantastic job and it's completely transformed the rooms. Had three installed at the same time.

Would definitely recommend!

Roof Space Renovators provided us with excellent products and service. We had a glass skylight installed into our home and absolutely love it. Our experience with this company was well above average from our initial enquiry to the completed job. We would be happy to recommend this company to friends and family. Thank you Roof Space Renovators.  :-)

Highest quality, was impressed by the strength and design of the ladder an the speed of delivery.

Clear instructions made it easy to install too

Fantastic experience working with Roofspace Renovators to kit out my garage.  Col understood my ideas and provided a great solution, and Mick worked with me throughout the installation to make sure everything was assembled correctly.  Very friendly and accommodating people - thanks, guys.  And not forgetting Jodie in the office who was also very friendly and efficient!

Roof Space Renovators installed Atlite skylights / sky windows in our house during a renovation. They were incredibly professional and helpful throughout the process from quoting to final payment. Their communication was some of the best I’ve experienced in the building industry. We are all so happy with the skylights installed - they add so much light and are a real design feature. As soon as painting is finished I’ll add some pictures.

Highly recomend Roof Space Renovators, from the first contact phone call, quoting and information provided
and then the  installation of our new stairs to our roof space, their service was amazing. We are so pleased with our new stairs....... Thankyou

We have had an attic ladder installed by Roof Space Renovators for ease of access to our ceiling/attic. This company would have to be one of the best group of people that we have worked with. They were professional, on time, clean and a quality product was provided. Colin and Scott were so easy to work with as well as Patricia.

Very happy with the supply and installation of our roof ventilators. Andrew was a pleasure to do business with. His advice was professional and expert with no sales pressure. Once we settled on what we wanted, Andrew was very prompt in getting the product supplied and arranged installation by his two   highly competent installers within a couple of days of our return from a holiday. We are more than happy with the whole process and have no hesitation in commending and recommending Roof Space Renovators.

I used Roof Space Renovators to install an attic ladder and convert some roof space into storage. Everyone I encountered from the office to the quote through to the two guys who installed were great. Quick and efficient on the day and very professional. Answered any questions I had and the quality seems spot on! I'll definitely have them back for more work in the future and would recommend them for sure!

We are so glad we used Roof Space Renovators , everyone was fantastic to deal with from Colin, Scott & Troy very professional . We had two Skylights installed and this has improved our home just as we expected and wanted.We would recommend this company to anyone looking for Skylights . Five Star service & workmanship very professional.

We absolutely love the extra storage space this conversion has given us. The roof space team were so awesome to deal with, right from initial contact through to quote and completion of the work. They were totally honest about what was achievable given the layout of our roof space, which we very much appreciate. The space looks so good and the workmanship is of a really high quality! Thank you team!!!

Great company to deal with.  Andrew showed up on time and helped us find an option that suited our needs and budget.  We had an attic ladder installed and 10 meters of flooring.  The builder Andrew was a nice guy as well and did fantastic work.  I would highly recommend the team at Roof Space Renovators!

Contextually I have been in the construction industry all my life. I am super happy with all the trades that undertook the work, they even cleaned up which is unheard off. can't recommend Roof Space enough. Yes I would recommend them definitely.

We love our new roof space! The team was so easy to work with and gave us all the information we needed. Scott had the job completed in such a short time too. I would highly recommend as a solution to space problems.
The team at RSR were very professional throughout the whole process from arranging a quote, and updated twice over 9 months, to booking in the installation and then the final installed product.

'Wow' is how I describe Roof Space Renovators, from the moment Col bounced through our door, excited about our space, went above and beyond to look in roof and explain how the skylights will work, was refreshing. To the amazing team Andrew, Scott, Jodie & Kim who's professionalism throughout the transaction was seamless.
Thank you all soo much, amazing service, customer care and product !

Andrew from Roof Space Renovators  provided us with a prompt quote at a good price. The work was carried out to a highest standard. I had Ben completing my attic ladder installation and extra storage space in roof  .He was on time and very particular about the quality of work his company provides and takes great care to ensure all work undertaken is to professional standard.I highly recommended Roof Space Renovators .Thanks Andrew and Ben for the great service and quality work.

Bee @ Kenmore 4069

We had Scott come to replace our skylight and he did a really great job. A very friendly person who’s very attentive at his job. He has great attention to detail. The staff that I phoned with were also very friendly and helpful. It was a pleasure doing business with this company.

Very happy with our 2x Atlite roof windows, they make a significant difference to our home. The install was very reasonably priced. We had dozens of questions through the process and got quick answers; they were also helpful when we wanted to get some additional cosmetic work done to change the final look.

Overall great business to deal with.
Very professional with a great range of products. Scott the installer was great !
These guys were great to deal with - prompt on communications, showed up on time and worked efficiently. Love our new skylight, thank you!
Great communication and advice on which products to use for skylights in kitchen area. Would highly recommend.
We had a great experience from the quote all the way through to installation.  The team are very responsive and professional.

Roof space renovators did a fantastic job installing my new skylights. They were great communicators and competed the job professionally and on time.
I’m so glad I finally went ahead with getting skylights - I love my new bright living area and kitchen.

Very impressed with the recent work completed by Jed from Roof Space Renovators. Jed installed an attic ladder and laid flooring in our roof to open up better storage solutions in our home. Jeds professionalism and craftsmanship is incredible and both my wife and I are extremely happy with the result. From the initial consult with Colin who was able to narrow down the best options for us and then from Jed completing the work. Thank you both, we love the new space.

Roof Space Renos were excellent to work with. We had a fixed window skylight installed in out kitchen.
They always kept us informed at every step of the project.
Tradies were polite, efficient, tidy and on time.
Would highly recommend.

We have always had an access ladder in our houses. When we were looking for an installer for one in our latest home, we chose Roof Space Renovators. Andrew and his team were brilliant, from working out the most suitable position to installation. Highly recommended.
Thanks for great service & beautiful skylights! Very friendly staff

Really pleased with the Skylight we had installed recently. It lets in SO much natural light into a living room which was previously very dreary. Roof space renovators were fabulous- great communication and you could tell Mick who installed the Skylight took great pride in his work. We had a solar blind installed as well which is great for movie days when you need a bit of darkness. Hooray for more indoor plants!
Everything was easy, from calling/booking, to site assessment, to installation. Very happy

I would recommend Roof Space Renovators to anyone wanting to make use of that wasted space. Colin is such a personable guy who helped me feel comfortable about what I was undertaking and Daniel worked hard around my tricky electrical cable challenge until the job was done. Added to that, Jodie's control over the entire process enhances the feeling of being in safe hands. It's a lovely neat job. I'm even happy with the price. Top marks! Gillian. Redcliffe.

This family run business is so professional. Communication was great. Staff were super helpful. Scott (installer) and Dan (plasterer) were both on time and tidy. I’m so chuffed with my windows which allow the light to stream through the kitchen and dining area which was previously dark.

Very impressed with the service we recieved, very professional from start to finish. Colin, Jodie, Caleb and Mick were all very helpful and my attic floor and whirly bird installation went very smoothly. Thanks folks

We recently purchased a house with an attic that had been converted by Roof Space Renovators. It is one of our favourite parts of the house with heaps of storage and 5 Fakro skylight windows. We have been in contact with Roof Space Renovators to get accessories for the attic and Jodie was lovely to deal with and very helpful! Highly recommend their customer service and can certainly vouch for the quality of their attics. We love it!

Scott from Roof Space Renovators has just completed the installation of an attic in our house.  He has done a fabulous job, installing a sturdy folding stair and laying a solid floor in the roof cavity.  He was very courteous, friendly and tidied up what little mess was made during the installation.  I would highly recommend Roof Space Renovators for this type of work.  Im very happy.

I always appreciate a business that provides not only great durable products, but great service as well. These guys are fantastic, the installer who installed our attic ladder was courteous and a great guy, Andrew is a brilliant sales rep, he was only interested in the best solution for our business not about me spending up big and Jodie in the office made sure it all happened smoothly, she had impeccable knowledge and customer service.
From one company to another - Guys you Rock.. Thank you so very much.
Did a terrific job installing 3 large skylights in our new house. They transform the room and look great. Very happy with the advice, service and installation. Highly recommend them.

From the first contact with Roof Space Renovators they were 5 star service all the way.
Colin was amazing when he came out and did up a quote, and Jed and Trey the installers and plasterer were fabulous! We have an abundance of natural light which has allowed me to purchase more indoor plants.

Fabulous experience. Col was punctual, easy to talk to and never had an issue with all the questions I asked. The installation was done so fast and no mess left at the end. We love our storage, we now no longer have to pay for off-site storage and can easily access our belongings whenever we want. When we save up more money we'll prob get you back to do the entire roof space. Highly recommend.

The whole experience was brilliant. From initial contact through to installation, the team took us through everything that was going on including timelines etc, arrived on time as per schedule and did a fantastic job!
5 star service and business!
Highly recommend

I highly recommend Roof Space Renovators. They were so accommodating with my requirements, prompt at scheduling my job and an absolute pleasure to deal with and talk to. The workmanship was outstanding and he left the house cleaner then when he arrived. I can not speak highly enough of Andrew and the team.

From query, to quote, to job completion I met or spoke with very friendly and pleasant members of their team. The job was completed to a high standard and had very minimal impact on my day even as I looked after my 6 month old in the house while they renovated. I definitely recommend these guys.

We wanted to move our roof space manhole from a bedroom to elsewhere, and at the same time install a folding ladder for easier access. The team from Roof Space Renovators done a good job from quote to installation and clean up, and also thanks to Jodie from the office to organise things.

We were building a new home and were looking for an attic ladder to be installed for storage access to our ceiling area.
Jodie and Andrew made the process really easy and have been very helpful throughout. The installer was on time and friendly.
We would happily recommend this company to anyone.
Christine

Excellent service from start (Col coming to my house to give ideas/quote) to finish (Clint and Andrew fixing the Garageflex to my walls). I am very happy with the finished product, particularly with the space it gives me in my garage. Special mention of Clint for his attention to detail.

We recently had our roof space sheeted out and a ladder installed and we found the team at Roof Space Removators extremely helpful and professional. The Carpenter that did the work was awesome as well and we are very happy with his work. I would recomend them to my freinds and family.
We are delighted with our new electric opening roof windows. The installers went above and beyond to make sure we had them put in the ideal location. Company was a pleasure to deal with.

I'd been searching for this type of product for awhile.
Found Roof Space Renovators at the Brisbane home show back in August.

Personally I found it as a "Shutup and take my money" situation that had exactly what I wanted and for a fantastic price.

Andrew was a delight to deal with to organise the installation of my ceiling ladder. Workmanship was mint and couldn't find anything to fault  the installation.

I would highly recommend anyone looking for the ceiling access products or a means to better use the otherwise void space in their ceiling best get in contact with Andrew.
Very pleased with the replacement of our ancient skylight. Roof Renovators provided friendly service, good advice, reasonable cost and installed a quality product.

Jodie and the team were great to work with.  They installed an attic ladder and roof access hatch for us. There was a minor issue with the roof hatch on install, they were back to fix it promptly, no problems at all.  It has made access to the roof so safe and easy.  Thank you!

Overall great experience, from initial quote by Colin, the communication was good and Scott who carried out the work was excellent. Very happy with the dust proof room, now have loads of useful storage and highly recommend this team

We are so pleased with our ladder in the roof.  Great service from the rep who came to measure and advise what would work the best for us, the installer and the electrician were all excellent tradies.  We have already recommended your service to other interested parties.  Well Done, great job!

I have no issues with Roof Space Renovators - they were grate to deal with from start to finish and the standard of work completed was really high. I would happily recommend this company to a friend or family.
Scott was fantastic! I had a skylight installed in a high stairwell- Scott worked for almost 12 hours to do a wonderful job. Neat tidy and looks great thanks Scott and Roof Space Renovators

I am most grateful for the professional,  courteous and competent tradesmen who completed my project.  At all times, they kept me informed, completed work in the agreed time - prepared and made sure my home was protected and kept clean at all times.  Absolutely recommend - GREAT to observe genuine and caring tradies!!  thank you!

I love having the extra space! The whole process was very easy. The cost was better than expected and the lads were friendly and efficient. Highly recommended 👌.  Thanks everyone at Roof Space Renovators for a job well done!

Great product —- new wide aluminium ladder —— and large storage area.  S
Sales service was good and the installation team performed superbly ——- workmanship, personal interaction and timeframe were outstanding.  Happy to recommend the product and service.

DaveB 0423600506

We had a great experience and are really grateful for the professionalism and quality of the work that Roof Space Reonovators did for us in our new home. We now have the storage space we were lacking. Thanks team.

You guys were recommended by friends of ours.
Fantastic. I LOVE my new skylight. Service A+++ Quality of Products A+++ Attention to Detail A+++.
Couldn't be happier. Thanks Jodie and the crew.
I will be spreading the word with all my other friends and family too.

We had an attic & ladder installed in our little Queenslander and it has been the best investment on the home we have ever made!  We have so much extra storage space and we use it weekly, and pop down the ladder and up we go.  All of our Christmas decorations and tree are stored up there, along with costume boxes and files that we don't use often.  So beneficial - we wish we did it 20 years ago!!!  From Tara & Mick
AMAZING!!! Very happy with the service and very happy with the product. They are professional, timely, the product looks and works great and a well-done Installation.

My personal thank you for everything guys. This attic ladder is soooo much better than the tradie ladder my husband has been making me use. I feel safe and i can now access our stock by myself.
We will definitely have you guys transform our roof space at home, i never thought about just how much wasted space is up here. I could have my parents retreat after all.
Super excited and cant wait.. Book me in for a quote after Christmas please.

From start to finish the process and customer service was exceptional. We adjusted our quote and it wasn't a problem at all, stuck to our budget and the finished product is immaculate! Highly recommend.

After spending the weekend at home with the newly installed Roof Window, 550mm x 1400 mm, it's the best. It works so well at different times of the day and opens up the heart of the townhouse to natural light. Love looking up and seeing blue sky and clouds. Best improvement so far. Regards Simon and Kerry.
100% recommend. Great responsive professional service. Well priced. Cant fault anything at all. Sam the installer also did a great job. Excellent housekeeping and efficient.

Happy they were able to do the job (install 2 velux skylights pre bought), turned up on time, the installer WASNT very competent with installing to colourbond roof, finished the job in 5 hours (at a cost of $1100), removed a batten from the roof to get skylight in, DIDNT replace it to hold roofing or skylight, screwed off flashings didn't clean up after himself, as it has rained since there are rust marks on the roof where skylight and flashings were installed, i called ANDREW the Builder? as i explained the story and sent him photos, he proceeded to tell me that it wasn't his guys fault, i only asked if he could come inspect the workmanship his employee had done, argued with me over the phone and then hung up with out solving there situation.
I was happy to pay the high fee to install the lights but when workmanship ship is so poor and the job was rushed, also the director of the company doesn't want to help the client out when there is an issue.
Very poor service, poor communication, poor work ethic.

Thank you to Jodie, Scott and Andrew for helping us out with a repair and replace of our sky windows. It was not an easy job and they were extremely helpful and professional. I would highly recommend them!

Really rate Roof Space Renovators. The team that carried out the work were skilled and diligent and involved me in practical outcome decisions whilst the works were underway. I'm really happy with the outcome.
Seamless scheduling between different trades. Friendly team. Fantastic end result, it has transformed our room.

What a great company to do business with ! From my initial telephone enquiry then onto Col, for his advice and quotation, then finally to the ultimate tradesman, Scott, the whole process was smooth and professional. A great team !

Thank you Roof Space Renovators for your work on our property... we got an attic ladder put in and some attic flooring laid down. I can say that my electrician smiles every time he sees the attic ladder, I too smile when I reminisce how I previously had to drag out the old trade ladder and pull my self up that last bit to get up there. Now it’s an easy climb up a lovely ladder and out onto some solid flooring. The build with RSR was done in one day, and yes there was a hiccup along the way, but RSR did a fantastic job at putting the customer first and fixing the hiccups. RSR had a caring nature about the job and the customer service. I would recommend them to others.

Andy......sorry Andrew 😁 you are an absolute legend thank you very much. Retuned my call quickly ( still waiting for the other companies to call back ? ) Your knowledge, advice and service has saved me a lot of money. Have forwarded your details in and will continue to recommend you and your team. Thanks again. Ty
Installed attic ladder. From the quote to installation I had a great experience. The process was well explained and the final product more than met my expectations. Definitely recommend the business.
So glad we came across Roofspace Renovators. Very happy with our new storage space. Everyone we dealt with was professional and friendly, thank you.
Andrew and his team have been fantastic to work with, I highly recommend Roof Space Renovators!

Can highly recommend going with this business if you're looking to substantially increase the storage in your home at a relatively low cost. Their prices are reasonable and the owners are very helpful. Their attic ladders feel secure (coming from someone who's afraid of small heights) and look good.

They provided great service, were very polite, even went the extra mile to fit me into their schedule to get it fitted quickly for me, and their price was very good.  Would definitely recommend this company.

The whole team, from quoting, installation and payment were extremely professional, courteous and responsive. Installation especially was very neat and tidy with minimal mess and disruption. Would unreservedly recommend to others.

Onsite quote/inspection was superb.
Unfortunately could not utlise roof space renovators for their services but had to leave a positive review for the time, effort and expertise.
Quick and efficient and great value. Exactly what we wanted for more storage in our roof! Thank you!

. The guys were very friendly, prompt and tidy !!! The difference to the light in the rooms are amazing… love them  !
Highly recommend Roof Space Renovators !!
Andrew and the team had great communication and did an incredible job installing skylights in our home. Would highly recommend them!
Thank you again to everyone at Roof Space Renovators! We just had a second ladder and a storage space installed above our garage. Couldn’t be happier with the entire process.
Fantastic Result from these Guys. All installed in a day, workmanship is very high quality and great team to deal with, can't fault them at all !
From first contact to when Col came out to measure and quote was great. Answered any questions we had and explained the whole process, installation was quick with a great result,
Thank you to roof space renovators. They are a very clean and professional company...would highly recommend them to family, friends and colleagues. Chris Graceville
Col came over to give me a quote the other day. He was so nice and extremely helpful. He was very patient answering all of my many many questions. Thank you Col, it was so nice to meet you.

We love our new roof renovation.  It has lots of stuff up in there now. Thank you so much. Micheal was so nice. He answered  all my questions  and left the  place I think cleaner then when he got there. Lol
Excellent bunch of people who provide a high quality, flexible & reliable service. Money well spent as the product surpassed our expectations & is adding value to our lives! Much appreciated :-)
The team were fabulous to deal with - were able to come up with a roof window solution that they could install within my tight timeframe. Can’t recommend them highly enough
Great customer service, very prompt and responsive to our enquiries.  Excellent and speedy install and an outstanding finished product.  Highly recommended.  Thank you so much Andrew and team.
From the first skylight I was hooked!!  Great work, great guys, I’ve just had two more installed!
Replaced our old skylight with an openable one. Excellent service, they arrived on time and completed the work very quickly.
Excellent service from Scott and Clint at Roof Space Renovators, highly recommend this company if you’re in the market to get additional space at home.
Clear communication on what was needed for the job and the tradies turned up on time and were friendly.
Fantastic job and great people to work with
Great to deal with always kept us informed of progress. Great job, done promptly and finished product looks amazing. Very happy customers.

Awesome to deal with, we got an under the stairs roller door put in allowing for massive storage and had garagetek installed, awesome service and would 100% deal with again! thanks Andrew and the team!
Andrew and Jodie were extremely helpful and knowlegable, I highly recommend them.
I just had a skylight installed in my ensuite and it has completely transformed the room. Great service from start to finish, very professional
Wonderfully professional. Found the perfect solution for my needs and were efficient with the job. Absolutely recommend.
I have ordered GarageSmart System and I am absolutely happy with the installation quality and quality of the the supplied products.
Excellent service and workmanship with cleanup after their job. Did what they said they would and came the time they said they would
Amazing work, on time and the result is fantastic.  The boys worked to get the job done on time, despite bad weather!
Roof space renovators installed a dust proof attic for us - very happy with the storage space and the quick/prompt service.
The entire team was fantastic from start to finish! They did a wonderful job and cleaned up after themselves. Thanks RSR :)
The service was fantastic, the crew were awesome, and the end result exceeded my expectations! thank team
Thanks Andrew for your great service as always, the product is great and your work with the install was very satisfying.
Fantastic quoting and the work was carried out promptly and efficiently. Very happy!
Very happy with the supply and install of our attic ladder. Thanks guys - highly recommended!
Efficient, prompt service.  Always did what they said to a high standard and arrived when they said they would.  Would recommend to anyone.
Excellent. Job done on time and as promised. No issues and I would highly recommend them
Attic flooring installed. Great experience and service and quality result, very happy with the new attic space.
Col was friendly, honest and upfront in all aspects. A professional team no doubt.
Excellent company to deal with. I would highly recommend this them to all my friends and family.
Great to deal with, prompt inspection & quote. They turned up when they said they would.
Our home is now bathed in light, thanks to the team at Roof Space Renovators
Awesome service, and a perfect result, thank you so much!
Super happy with whole process
The whole process was seamless and done really quickly and well.
Fast. Knowledgeable and adaptable. Worked in between other tradies brilliantly.
Let there be light!
Attic ladder and storage space installed on time and well finished.
Always helpful and have a great range in stock
Prompt Service and great job.
Excellent service
Very helpful

Mick and Clint did an amazing job in installing our ceiling letter. I can now store so much more and not worry about falling every time I go up there. It is extremely sturdy and they did a wonderful job in the roof, very professional and friendly. I was very impressed with the company right from the beginning and throughout the whole process. Highly recommend them.

Very happy with our new Velux skylight. From the clever solutions offered at initial consultation to the skilled installation technicians, the whole experience was positive. Good product, fair price, and great service.

The team at Roof Space Renovators were a pleasure to deal with from the start. Jodie and the team answered all our questions when we visited their showroom; and we discussed options with Col when he came onsite and quoted. Caleb and Mick did the install of both a basic storage and a dust proof area with an attic ladder and we're very happy with the extra storage space it's given us. We later had two Haven solar vents installed, and despite some initial problems with the temperature sensors, Andrew at Roof Space quickly organized for these to be investigated and they were fixed. Would definitely recommend.
Amazing from start to finish!

The Roof Space Renovator team were absolutely outstanding.  From my first visit to their excellent showroom to the supply of their Brisbane made ladder through to the expert installation and completion of the job, there was absolute professionalism.  I highly recommend the Roof Space Renovators team to anyone looking to install or replace access systems to their attic.  A great local company.
Great experience and great job done. Many thanks

The team at Roof Space Renovators were fantastic, from first contact, to inspection and installation. An effortless process for us and super friendly staff. We have gained a huge amount of additional storage. Also highly recommend getting the $15 two led light bar kit to light up your roof space (pic was taken at night no flash), they are magnetic and stick to the roof easily for the short times your up there.

The staff were very friendly and professional. They tidied up any mess at the end of each day and the quality of their workmanship is fantastic. I was impressed with this business from start to finish and would highly recommend to anyone wanting to install an attic. They even matched the panelling on the attic hatch with my roof panelling.
Great workmanship. Super fast progress. And very easy and friendly service all around. Highly recommended!
I’m very happy with my new attic. I recommend them. It looks stunning.

We were very happy with the end result. The lads that installed it were friendly and professional. The initial consult with Colin was down to earth, honest and friendly.
Highly recommend this company

analysis.summary: Customers overwhelmingly praise the professionalism, cleanliness, and communication of the team, with specific highlights on fast turnaround times and high-quality craftsmanship for skylights and attic renovations.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: The team were friendly, tidy, and respectful throughout the job, making sure to clean up at the end of each day.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Brett
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Addresses common homeowner anxiety about mess and disruption during renovations.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: They listened to my concerns about future storm damage risk and were able to future proof my skylight with a toughened glass double glazed product.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Wendy
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Demonstrates expertise and consultative approach rather than just selling a product.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: From our initial web enquiry... the response was extremely fast and appointment scheduled very quickly.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Sean
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Highlights operational efficiency and ease of doing business.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: The result is fantastic – a great finish that has completely transformed what was previously wasted space into something really useful.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Brett
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Showcases the tangible value and transformation provided by the service.

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data; however, the volume and consistency of 5-star reviews suggest high customer satisfaction regardless of reply visibility.
redesign_hooks: Feature the 'clean up at the end of each day' quote in the 'Our Process' section to alleviate mess concerns.
Use the 'future proof my skylight' snippet in the 'Skylight Services' page to highlight technical expertise and durability.
Display the 'fast response' quote near the contact form to encourage immediate inquiries.
